detectors.description:
DePocket.burnTokenCheck(address,address,uint256) (DePocket.sol#723-751) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- _safeOwner = recipient (DePocket.sol#725)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		DePocket.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		DePocket.transfer(address,uint256)
		DePocket._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)

	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory

	- ArraySliceDynamicallyEncodedBaseType
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow

It is used by:
	- ^0.6.0 (DePocket.sol#1)
